author: Redjumpman (original concept)
hbicofbiology (swamp creature recreation)
install_msg:
Swamp Race has been installed! Use `[p]race start` to begin a race.
Original Race concept by Redjumpman. Swamp creature twist by Bbygrl.
name: Race
short: Race swamp creatures against your friends!
description: A multiplayer swamp creature racing game for Discord. Players join a lobby, then watch as their swamp creatures sprint through the muck to the finish line. Features betting, prize pooling, stats tracking, and animated GIF visuals. Inspired by Redjumpman's original Race cog.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user IDs, race placement stats (1st/2nd/3rd wins and losses), and total games played per server.
